How I Work

My Simple Process

1

Discovery

We discuss your brand, goals, target audience and project requirements in detail.

2

Design

I create mockups and design concepts tailored perfectly to your brand identity.

3

Development

I build your store with attention to detail, speed, mobile-friendliness and conversions.

4

Launch

We review, test and go live. I support you after launch to ensure everything runs smoothly.

FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does it take to build a Shopify store? +
A typical Shopify store takes 5-14 days depending on complexity, number of products and custom features required. I communicate timelines upfront and always stick to them.
Do you offer revisions? +
Yes! I include up to 3 rounds of revisions with every project to make sure you are 100% happy with the final result. Your satisfaction is my priority.
Can you redesign my existing store? +
Absolutely! Store redesigns are one of my specialties. I will analyze your current store, identify conversion bottlenecks, and create a new design that drives better results.
What information do you need to get started? +
I will need your brand colors and logo if available, product details, reference websites you like, and your target audience. We go over everything in our discovery chat - no stress!
Do you help with SEO after the website is built? +
Yes! I offer standalone SEO packages and can add SEO to any design project. This includes keyword research, meta tag setup, image optimization and more.
How much does a Shopify website design cost? +
Basic stores start from $150 while fully custom builds vary. I offer competitive rates on Fiverr and Upwork. Contact me for a free quote tailored to your needs!
Do you work with clients outside Nigeria? +
Yes! I work with clients worldwide and communicate via WhatsApp, email and video calls regardless of your time zone.
What payment methods do you accept? +
I accept payments through Upwork, Fiverr and direct bank transfer. For direct projects I take a 50% deposit before starting and 50% upon completion.

About Me

Home › About

3+
Years Experience
Who I Am

Hi, I'm Opeyemi Adebayo

Known professionally as MaryJaneTech, I'm a passionate ecommerce web designer with over 3 years of experience building stunning, high-converting online stores for entrepreneurs and businesses around the world.

I specialize in Shopify, Webflow, and Wix - crafting tailored ecommerce experiences that don't just look beautiful but actually drive sales.

I also specialize in SEO optimization and product listing - making sure your store gets found by the right customers on Google.

I believe in showing up fully for every client. You'll find me responsive, committed, and genuinely invested in your success.

FAQ

Questions About Working With Me

Are you available for long-term collaborations? +
Yes! I love building long-term relationships with clients. Many come back regularly for new projects, store updates, SEO work and product listing optimization.
What time zone do you work in? +
I'm based in Nigeria (WAT, UTC+1), but I work flexible hours to accommodate clients across different time zones - especially US, UK and European clients.
Do you work on weekends? +
Yes! I'm available 7 days a week and will communicate with you whenever needed, including weekends for urgent projects.
How do I get started with you? +
Simply reach out via the Contact page, WhatsApp, or Upwork/Fiverr. We'll have a quick discovery conversation then I'll send a clear proposal and timeline.

FAQ

Before You Reach Out

How quickly do you respond to enquiries? +
I typically respond within 2-6 hours via WhatsApp and within 24 hours via email. For urgent projects, WhatsApp is the fastest way to reach me!
Do you offer free consultations? +
Yes! I offer a free 15-20 minute discovery chat to understand your project requirements with no obligation at all.
What happens after I send this form? +
I'll review your message and reply within 24 hours. Then we'll arrange a quick discovery call to go over your project in detail before I send a proposal.
Can I see more portfolio examples? +
Yes! Visit my Upwork or Fiverr profiles to see more client reviews and portfolio samples. You can also check my Instagram for recent work.
